items.title: Chart-type decision flowchart for ML EDA
items.caption: Walk the tree in order: question → variable types → one of six core chart families.

items.title: Wrong chart for the question
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  wrong["Line chart on unordered categories"]
  wrong --> implies["Implies false trend between bars"]
  fix["Use bar for categories"]
  implies --> fix
items.caption: Chart choice encodes semantics; a line between unrelated categories misleads readers.

items.title: Where this topic sits in the visualization stack
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  question["Analytical question"]
  question --> choose["Choosing chart types — this topic"]
  choose --> lib["Matplotlib / Seaborn / Plotly"]
  lib --> output["Notebook or report figure"]
items.caption: Decide the chart family here; library topics own syntax, styling, and interactivity.
